attacking_style: Initiates explosive attacks on steep gradients mid-climb (often 6-7km from summit), frequently going early before race favorites counter. Opportunistic on minor climbs (cat-3) when GC group hesitates, banking time through tactical surprise rather than pure power.
team_tactics: Given dual-role flexibility: initiates tempo or attacks ahead of protected leader (UAE's Pogačar) to test rivals, but also rides own GC when form permits. Team allows tactical freedom to attack even away from designated leader, suggesting protected co-leader status.
terrain_preference: Steep gradient ramps (6%+) where explosive acceleration matters more than sustained power. Struggles on prolonged HC climbs where pure stamina dominates. Unexpectedly competent in time trials for a pure climber archetype (2023 TDF podium via TT).
vulnerability: Collapses spectacularly on multi-climb stages, especially second/third HC ascents in same day. Poor pacing judgment in time trials (strong first half, catastrophic fade). Early positioning errors leave him chasing in critical GC splits.
key_patterns: Attacks prematurely, often dragging stronger rivals (Roglič/Mas) to close own moves (3 instances)
Explosive on steep ramps but dropped early on prolonged HC climbs (4 instances)
ITT pacing misjudgment: fast start, severe second-half collapse (2 Vuelta observations)
Collaborates tactically with twin Simon in breakaways, outsprints him in finishes (2 instances)
Lacks final 300m punch when positioned perfectly behind accelerating rivals (2 instances)
Better form late-season: Il Lombardia podiums when others fade (2021/2023)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 TDF showed unexpected TT strength and GC climbing legs (podium finish), animated winning Lombardia move. Elevation from domestique to protected co-leader role at UAE indicates sustained high-level form.
